---
title: "ORIEN_NSCLC_Table1"
author: "Dipankor Dhrubo"
date: "2025-09-24"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tableone)
library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
```

```{r}
Predata<- read_rds("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Lung_resampled_data.rds")

#### Loading Clinical data 

Diagnosis <- bind_rows(read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2023_11_30/Clinical_Data/20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20230620_Diagnosis_V4.csv"),
                          read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2024_05_01/20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20240221_Diagnosis_V4.csv")) %>% 
  filter(AvatarKey %in% Predata$AvatarKey) %>% select(AvatarKey,AgeAtDiagnosis,GradeClinical,PathGroupStage, ClinGroupStage) %>% 
  filter(! AgeAtDiagnosis == "Unknown/Not Applicable") %>%
  filter(! AgeAtDiagnosis == "Age Unknown/Not Recorded") %>%
  mutate(AgeAtDiagnosis = ifelse(grepl("Age 90 or older", AgeAtDiagnosis), "90", AgeAtDiagnosis))

### Taking the latest diagnostic time

Diagnosis <- Diagnosis %>%
  group_by(AvatarKey) %>%
  arrange(AgeAtDiagnosis) %>%  # Ensure it's sorted by age
  slice_min(order_by = AgeAtDiagnosis, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%  # Keep the first diagnosis
  ungroup() %>% rename(Age = AgeAtDiagnosis)


Prim_met <- bind_rows(read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2023_11_30/Clinical_Data/20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20230620_ClinicalMolLinkage_V4.csv"),
                          read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2024_05_01//20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20240221_ClinicalMolLinkage_V4.csv")) %>% 
  filter(RNASeq %in% Predata$sample) %>% select(ORIENAvatarKey,Primary.Met, Age.At.Specimen.Collection) %>% rename(AvatarKey = ORIENAvatarKey,
                                                                                                  Primary_Met = Primary.Met) %>%
  mutate(Age.At.Specimen.Collection = as.numeric(Age.At.Specimen.Collection)) %>%
  group_by(AvatarKey) %>%
  arrange(Age.At.Specimen.Collection) %>%  # Ensure it's sorted by age
  slice_max(order_by = Age.At.Specimen.Collection, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%  # Keep the first diagnosis
  ungroup() %>% select(-Age.At.Specimen.Collection)

Progression_recurrence<- bind_rows(read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2023_11_30/Clinical_Data/20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20230620_Outcomes_V4.csv"),
                          read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2024_05_01//20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20240221_Outcomes_V4.csv")) %>% 
  filter(AvatarKey %in% Predata$AvatarKey) %>% select(AvatarKey,ProgRecurInd, AgeAtProgRecur) %>% mutate(AgeAtProgRecur = as.numeric(AgeAtProgRecur)) %>%
  group_by(AvatarKey) %>%
  arrange(AgeAtProgRecur) %>%  # Ensure it's sorted by age
  slice_max(order_by = AgeAtProgRecur, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%  # Keep the first diagnosis
  ungroup() %>% select(-AgeAtProgRecur)

Smoking<- bind_rows(read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2023_11_30/Clinical_Data/20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20230620_PatientHistory_V4.csv"),
                          read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2024_05_01//20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20240221_PatientHistory_V4.csv")) %>% 
  filter(AvatarKey %in% Predata$AvatarKey) %>% select(AvatarKey,SmokingStatus, AgeAtLastUpdate) %>% mutate(AgeAtLastUpdate = as.numeric(AgeAtLastUpdate)) %>%
  group_by(AvatarKey) %>%
  arrange(AgeAtLastUpdate) %>%  # Ensure it's sorted by age
  slice_max(order_by = AgeAtLastUpdate, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%  # Keep the first diagnosis
  ungroup() %>% select(-AgeAtLastUpdate)

BMI<- bind_rows(read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2023_11_30/Clinical_Data/20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20230620_PhysicalAssessment_V4.csv"),
                          read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2024_05_01//20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20240221_PhysicalAssessment_V4.csv")) %>% 
  filter(AvatarKey %in% Predata$AvatarKey) %>% select(AvatarKey,BMI, AgeAtPhysicalExam) %>% mutate(AgeAtPhysicalExam = as.numeric(AgeAtPhysicalExam)) %>%
  group_by(AvatarKey) %>%
  arrange(AgeAtPhysicalExam) %>%  # Ensure it's sorted by age
  slice_max(order_by = AgeAtPhysicalExam, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%  # Keep the first diagnosis
  ungroup() %>% select(-AgeAtPhysicalExam)

Radiation <- bind_rows(read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2023_11_30/Clinical_Data/20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20230620_Radiation_V4.csv"),
                          read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2024_05_01//20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20240221_Radiation_V4.csv")) %>% 
  filter(AvatarKey %in% Predata$AvatarKey) %>% select(AvatarKey,RadiationTherapyInd, AgeAtRadiationStart) %>% mutate(AgeAtRadiationStart = as.numeric(AgeAtRadiationStart)) %>%
  group_by(AvatarKey) %>%
  arrange(AgeAtRadiationStart) %>%  # Ensure it's sorted by age
  slice_max(order_by = AgeAtRadiationStart, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%  # Keep the first diagnosis
  ungroup() %>% select(-AgeAtRadiationStart)

Gender <- bind_rows(read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2023_11_30/Clinical_Data/20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20230620_PatientMaster_V4.csv"),
                          read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2024_05_01//20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20240221_PatientMaster_V4.csv")) %>% 
  filter(AvatarKey %in% Predata$AvatarKey) %>% select(AvatarKey,Sex, Race)

Histology<- bind_rows(read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2023_11_30/Clinical_Data/20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20230620_ClinicalMolLinkage_V4.csv"),
                     read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2024_05_01/20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20240221_ClinicalMolLinkage_V4.csv")) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  filter(RNASeq != "") %>%
  filter(RNASeq %in% Predata$sample) %>%
  select(RNASeq, ORIENAvatarKey, `Histology.Behavior`) %>% rename(AvatarKey = ORIENAvatarKey,
                                                                  Histology =`Histology.Behavior`)

```


```{r}
## Merging all into one

Metadata <- Predata %>%
  left_join(Diagnosis, by = "AvatarKey") %>%
  left_join(Radiation , by = "AvatarKey") %>% 
  left_join( Prim_met ,by = "AvatarKey") %>% 
  left_join(Gender , by = "AvatarKey") %>% 
  left_join(BMI , by = "AvatarKey") %>% 
  left_join(Smoking , by = "AvatarKey") %>% 
  left_join(Histology %>% select(-RNASeq),by = "AvatarKey") %>%
  left_join(Progression_recurrence , by = "AvatarKey") %>% 
  mutate(Stage = case_when(
    PathGroupStage == "0" ~ "0",
    PathGroupStage == "0a" ~ "0",
    PathGroupStage == "I" ~ "I",
    PathGroupStage == "IA" ~ "I",
    PathGroupStage == "IA1" ~ "I",
    PathGroupStage == "IB" ~ "I",
    PathGroupStage == "II" ~ "II",
    PathGroupStage == "IIA" ~ "II",
    PathGroupStage == "IIB" ~ "II",
    PathGroupStage == "IIC" ~ "II",
    PathGroupStage == "III" ~ "III",
    PathGroupStage == "IIIA" ~ "III",
    PathGroupStage == "IIIB" ~ "III",
    PathGroupStage == "IIIC" ~ "III",
    PathGroupStage == "IIIC1" ~ "III",
    PathGroupStage == "IV" ~ "IV",
    PathGroupStage == "IVA" ~ "IV",
    PathGroupStage == "IVB" ~ "IV",
    PathGroupStage == "IVC" ~ "IV",
    ClinGroupStage == "0" ~ "0",
    ClinGroupStage == "0a" ~ "0",
    ClinGroupStage == "I" ~ "I",
    ClinGroupStage == "IA" ~ "I",
    ClinGroupStage == "IA1" ~ "I",
    ClinGroupStage == "IA2" ~ "I",
    ClinGroupStage == "IB" ~ "I",
    ClinGroupStage == "IC" ~ "I",
    ClinGroupStage == "II" ~ "II",
    ClinGroupStage == "IIA" ~ "II",
    ClinGroupStage == "IIB" ~ "II",
    ClinGroupStage == "IIC" ~ "II",
    ClinGroupStage == "III" ~ "III",
    ClinGroupStage == "IIIA" ~ "III",
    ClinGroupStage == "IIIB" ~ "III",
    ClinGroupStage == "IIIC" ~ "III",
    ClinGroupStage == "IV" ~ "IV",
    ClinGroupStage == "IVA" ~ "IV",
    ClinGroupStage == "IVB" ~ "IV",
    ClinGroupStage == "IVC" ~ "IV",
    TRUE ~ "Unknown/Not Applicable"
  )) %>% 
  select(-c(PathGroupStage, ClinGroupStage, GradeClinical)) %>%
  mutate(
    Histology = case_when(
      grepl("adenocarcinoma|Adenocarcinoma|acinar|papillary|lepidic|mucinous|minimally invasive", Histology, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Adenocarcinoma",
      grepl("squamous cell|squamous|basaloid", Histology, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Squamous Cell Carcinoma",
      grepl("neuroendocrine", Histology, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Neuroendocrine Carcinoma",
      grepl("mesothelioma|sarcoma|seminoma|thymoma|malignant tumor|pleomorphic|paraganglioma|spindle", Histology, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Other Tumors",
      TRUE ~ "Other Carcinoma"  # Any diagnosis not fitting the above
    ))  %>%
  mutate(
    Race = as.character(Race),                      # in case it's a factor
    Race = if_else(Race == "Black or African American", "Black", Race),
    Race = factor(Race)                             # (optional) back to factor
) %>%
  mutate(
    Race = as.character(Race),
    Race = recode(
      Race,
      "American Indian, Aleutian, or Eskimo (includes all indigenous populations of the Western hemisphere)" = "Indigenous",
      "American Indian or Alaska Native" = "Indigenous",
      .default = Race
    ),
    Race = factor(Race)
) %>% unique()



```


```{r}
## Fine Tuning the data set for analysis


unknown_vals <- c("Unknown/Not Applicable","Unknown","Not Reported","NA")

Metadata <- Metadata %>%
  mutate(
    # keep numeric for survival, add factor for summaries
    status_f = factor(if_else(status == 1, "Death", "Alive"),
                      levels = c("Alive","Death")),

    # standardize text + Unknowns
    across(c(RadiationTherapyInd, Primary_Met, Sex, Race, SmokingStatus,
             Histology, ProgRecurInd, Stage),
           ~ {
             x <- as.character(.x)
             x <- str_trim(x)
             x[x %in% unknown_vals | x == ""] <- "Unknown"
             x
           }),

    # specific recodes / level orders
    RadiationTherapyInd = factor(RadiationTherapyInd,
                                 levels = c("No","Yes")),
    Primary_Met         = factor(Primary_Met,
                                 levels = c("Primary","Metastatic","Unknown")),
    Sex                 = factor(Sex,
                                 levels = c("Female","Male","Unknown")),
    SmokingStatus       = factor(SmokingStatus,
                                 levels = c("Never","Former/Ever","Current","Unknown")),
    Histology           = factor(Histology,
                                 levels = c("Adenocarcinoma","Squamous Cell Carcinoma","Other","Unknown")),
    ProgRecurInd        = factor(ProgRecurInd,
                                 levels = c("No","Progression","Recurrence","Unknown/Not Applicable")),
    Stage               = factor(Stage,
                                 levels = c("I","II","III","IV","Unknown")),
    # Race is already a factor; refactor to lock Unknown last (optional)
    Race                = factor(as.character(Race),
                                 levels = c(setdiff(sort(unique(as.character(Race))), "Unknown"), "Unknown"))
  ) %>% mutate(CAlevel = if_else(Candida <= 1125.25  , "Low", "High")) %>% ## 75th percentile based on mtsurv 
  mutate(BMI= as.numeric(BMI)) %>% mutate(Age= as.numeric(Age)) %>% 
  mutate(CAlevel = factor(CAlevel, levels=c("Low","High")))
  
write_rds(Metadata,"/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/NSCLC_metadata.rds")

### Tableone analysis

listVars <- c("BMI", "Age", "Sex","Stage","Histology","Race","RadiationTherapyInd","Primary_Met",
              "status_f","diagsurvtime","SmokingStatus","CAlevel")

catVars <- c("Sex","Stage","Histology","Race","Primary_Met","RadiationTherapyInd",
             "status_f","SmokingStatus","CAlevel")



table1 <- CreateTableOne(vars = listVars,
                         data = Metadata,
                         factorVars = catVars,
                         strata = "CAlevel")

tbl1.ppi <- print(table1,nonnormal = c("BMI","Age","diagsurvtime"))

write.csv(tbl1.ppi, "/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Table1_NSCLC_ORIEN.csv")

```
